stemHtml:
A pilot is planning a flight from aerodrome M to aerodrome N and, so as to increase the traffic load, uses the Reduced Contingency Fuel procedure for his/her fuel calculations, selecting a decision point (DP) and an aerodrome R as optional refuel station. Given the information below, calculate the minimum fuel required from aerodrome M to N.

Taxi Fuel at aerodrome M: 180 kg 
Final Reserve Fuel: 1300 kg 
Trip fuel from M to N via DP: 8500 kg 
Trip fuel from M to R: 7800 kg 
Trip Fuel from DP to N : 3500 kg 
Do NOT take into account Alternate and Extra Fuel. 
An ERA for the optional refuel station is NOT available.
